arg.name: robot_prefix
arg.description: Robot namespace/prefix used by goal follower node

arg.name: goal_topic
arg.description: PoseStamped goal topic

arg.name: use_takeoff
arg.description: Take off automatically before first goal

arg.name: takeoff_height
arg.description: Takeoff height in meters

arg.name: takeoff_duration_sec
arg.description: Takeoff duration in seconds

arg.name: go_to_duration_sec
arg.description: Go-to command duration in seconds

arg.name: land_on_shutdown
arg.description: Attempt landing when goal follower shuts down

arg.name: land_height
arg.description: Landing height in meters

arg.name: land_duration_sec
arg.description: Landing duration in seconds

arg.name: use_sim_time
arg.description: Use simulation time if true

arg.name: use_map_line_check
arg.description: If true, reject goals with blocked Bresenham line on static map

arg.name: map_topic
arg.description: OccupancyGrid topic for static map checks

arg.name: occupancy_block_threshold
arg.description: Occupancy value considered blocked

arg.name: treat_unknown_as_obstacle
arg.description: Treat unknown occupancy cells as blocked

arg.name: enable_waypoint_publisher
arg.description: Start waypoint publisher node when true

arg.name: waypoints
arg.description: Text file with waypoint rows like x, y or x, y, z

arg.name: waypoint_frame_id
arg.description: Frame id for published PoseStamped goals

arg.name: waypoint_default_z
arg.description: Default z used when CSV row has no z value

arg.name: waypoint_publish_period_sec
arg.description: Period between publishing CSV waypoints

arg.name: waypoint_start_delay_sec
arg.description: Delay before first waypoint publish

arg.name: map_yaml
arg.description: Static map YAML used by nav2 map_server

arg.name: crazyflies_yaml_file
arg.description: Crazyswarm2 robot configuration file

arg.name: odom_frame
arg.description: Frame published by Crazyswarm2 odometry (commonly world or odom)

arg.name: enable_service_compat
arg.description: Enable only when /<robot_prefix>/go_to and /takeoff are missing
